episode_theme: Arrival and first night - seven strangers trapped in sentient house

scenes.scene_purpose: Establish violent history, create dread
scenes.atmosphere: Opulent estate battered by storm, violence beneath luxury

shots.description: Storm-lashed exterior of Blackwood Estate; thunder illuminates gables as rain sheets across the frame, camera holds low and predatory.
shots.lighting: Tungsten-cool split, motivated practicals, atmospheric haze

shots.description: Tracking dolly glides toward front door through rain-soaked grounds, lightning flaring across stained glass while unseen presence advances.
shots.lighting: Tungsten-cool split, motivated practicals, atmospheric haze

shots.description: Candlelit interior reveal as door creaks open; first silhouette slips into frame by four seconds, fear reflected in polished floorboards.
shots.lighting: Tungsten-cool split, motivated practicals, atmospheric haze
